[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 01001010 3
2 11011111 7
3 11110111 7
4 10111110 6
5 11101101 6
6 11010111 6
7 00111011 5
